title: Attributes
description: Key-value pairs on the opening tag.

questions.prompt: Which is a correctly written attribute?
questions.explanation: attribute="value" with an equals sign and quoted value is the canonical form.

questions.prompt: Which attribute is BOOLEAN — its presence alone is enough?
questions.explanation: Boolean attributes like disabled, checked, required don't need a value.

questions.prompt: Give this input a name and mark it required.
questions.explanation: Forms submit inputs by their name. required makes the field mandatory.
